description:
You are an Administrative Services Manager overseeing the 'Mobile Banking App' project in OpenProject. Following a recent security audit, create a news announcement in the 'Mobile Banking App' project to inform all project stakeholders about upcoming compliance requirements using the following details:

Title: Mandatory Security Compliance Update - Q4 Deadline
Summary: All team members must complete security training and update authentication modules before the Q4 compliance deadline.
Description: 
Following our recent security audit, we have identified several areas that require immediate attention:
1. All authentication modules must be updated to support multi-factor authentication by November 30th.
2. Team members are required to complete the annual security awareness training by December 15th.
3. API endpoints handling sensitive financial data must undergo penetration testing before the Q4 release.

Please coordinate with your team leads to ensure all requirements are met on schedule. Contact the security team if you have any questions or concerns.

OpenProject is running at http://localhost:8080 and you are logged in as admin (password: Admin1234!).

metadata.expected_title: Mandatory Security Compliance Update - Q4 Deadline
metadata.expected_summary: All team members must complete security training and update authentication modules before the Q4 compliance deadline.
